things.name: The Beatles Story
things.description: Immersive journey through the lives and music of the Fab Four at Albert Dock

things.name: Albert Dock
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage waterfront complex with museums, galleries and restaurants

things.name: Tate Liverpool
things.description: Gallery of modern and contemporary art in a renovated dock warehouse

things.name: Liverpool Cathedral
things.description: Largest cathedral in the UK, an imposing Gothic Revival masterpiece

things.name: Merseyside Maritime Museum
things.description: Compelling stories of the sea, emigration and the Titanic

things.name: Walker Art Gallery
things.description: National Gallery of the North housing art from 1300 to the present day

things.name: Museum of Liverpool
things.description: Free museum celebrating the city's unique history, culture and global significance

things.name: Anfield Stadium
things.description: Legendary home of Liverpool FC with guided stadium and museum tours

things.name: Mathew Street
things.description: Birthplace of Merseybeat music and home of the original Cavern Club

things.name: St George's Hall
things.description: Magnificent neoclassical building with stunning interior concert rooms
